mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, age, email, phone, password, role) VALUES (#{username}, #{age}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{password}, #{role})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user
(username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%'))
